summary: Actions not pinned to commit SHAs (critical security issue—should use e.g. actions/checkout@a81bbbf8...). Python code exemplary: type hints, immutable dataclasses, specific exception handling, clean separation of parsing/aggregation/rendering. Workflow shell logic (lines 51–59) correct but complex; should extract to separate script. Assumes fixtures/ populated; no examples provided despite task requirement to create fixtures. Otherwise well-structured design undermined by incomplete delivery and security gap.
